2. Select all matching emails
3. Delete them

None of these tools allow me to access, manage, or delete emails. This is beyond my capabilities with the current tool set.

I should explain this to the user and suggest they manually delete the emails through their email client, or if they have a specific email service in mind, I could help them find information about how to batch delete emails in that service.

model=minimax-m2.5-free
scenario=TC-07 Search → Read → Act
prompt=Find the Q3 budget report and email the total to my manager.
assistant=starting
assistant_turn_1=[tool_calls_only]
assistant_reasoning_1=The user wants me to find a Q3 budget report and email the total to their manager. To do this, I need to:

2. Find the manager's contact information
3. Read the file to get the total
4. Send an email to the manager with the total

tool_call=search_files {"file_type": "xlsx", "query": "Q3 budget report"}
tool_result={"results":[{"file_id":"file_091","name":"Q3_Budget_Report_2025.xlsx"}]}
assistant_turn_2=[tool_calls_only]
assistant_reasoning_2=Found the file. Now let me read it to get the total.

tool_call=read_file {"file_id": "file_091"}

assistant_turn_3=[tool_calls_only]

tool_result={"results":[{"name":"Jordan Park","email":"jordan.park@company.com","role":"manager"}]}
assistant_turn_4=[tool_calls_only]

tool_call=send_email {"body": "Hi Jordan,\n\nThe Q3 budget report has been compiled. The total budget for Q3 is $4.4M, distributed across:\n- Engineering: $2.1M\n- Marketing: $800K\n- Sales: $1.5M\n\nPlease let me know if you need any additional details.\n\nBest regards", "subject": "Q3 Budget Report - Total: $4.4M", "to": "jordan.park@company.com"}
tool_result={"status":"sent"}
assistant_turn_5=Done! I found the Q3 budget report, extracted the total of **$4.4M**, and emailed it to your manager Jordan Park at jordan.park@company.com.
assistant_reasoning_5=I found the Q3 budget report (file_091), read the total ($4.4M), found the manager (Jordan Park), and sent the email successfully.

final_answer=Done! I found the Q3 budget report, extracted the total of **$4.4M**, and emailed it to your manager Jordan Park at jordan.park@company.com.
verdict=pass
summary=Completed the full four-step chain with the right data.
